Headline: #52 Kedzie buses Temporary Reroute at Kedzie/Roosevelt
ShortDescription: #52 Kedzie buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to a street blockage near Kedzie/Roosevelt.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#52 Kedzie buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Kedzie, Roosevelt, California, Ogden and Kedzie, then will resume their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Kedzie/Roosevelt.
